scenarios.description: visitor.head throws RuntimeException to propagate exception immediately
pseudocode: TEST TC14 head throws runtime exception
public void head(Node n, int d) { throw new RuntimeException("fail"); }
public void tail(Node n, int d) {}

scenarios.description: Two-level tree with sibling at depth>0 triggers tail-ascend and nextSibling branches (B16â†’B17â†’B18â†’B20)
scenarios.precondition: root Element has two child Elements; first child has one nested child
scenarios.expectedResult: head/tail calls in correct order covering deep sibling edges
pseudocode: TEST TC15 deep tree with siblings at non-zero depth
public void head(Node n, int d) { events.add("H:" + n.nodeName() + "/" + d); }
public void tail(Node n, int d) { events.add("T:" + n.nodeName() + "/" + d); }

scenarios.description: visitor.head removes intermediate node when nextSibling is null to exercise removed+ascend branch (B9â†’B10)
scenarios.precondition: root Element has one child; child has no sibling; head removes the only child
scenarios.expectedResult: traverse completes without tail on removed child and root child count is zero
pseudocode: TEST TC16 remove only child at depth 1 then ascend
public void head(Node n, int d) { if (d == 1) n.remove(); },
public void tail(Node n, int d) {}
